source: pragma solidity ^0.8.20; contract LocalVault { mapping(address=>uint256) public balances; function deposit() external payable { balances[msg.sender]+=msg.value; } function withdraw() external { uint256 amount=balances[msg.sender]; (bool ok,)=msg.sender.call{value:amount}(""); require(ok); balances[msg.sender]=0; } }
